# Euro Truck Simulator 2 Jump Starter

Is a modified version of the [Steam Workshop](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1656493080) `Money & XP Cheat (Jump Starter)` for Euro Truck Simulator 2, to suit me and my friends needs to be less grindy on ETS2 and still not be given hand on the rest.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> I do not own any rights or ownership of this, I've asked and been given permission, modify and republish it with the proper credits.

# How to use this?

- Click the green button `< > Code ▼`
- `Download ZIP`
- File will be called `ets2-jump-starter-main.zip`
- Extract the contents `ets2-jump-starter-main` onto `C:\Users\<Your Username>\Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod`
- Remove the `-main` part of the folder name and now you should have the following:

```
ets2-jump-starter/
├── universal/
│   ├── def/
│   │   └── economy_data.sii
│   ├── manifest.sii
│   ├── mod_description.txt
│   └── mod_icon.jpg
└── versions.sii
```

If you check the file `economy_data.sii`

```
├── universal/
│   ├── def/
│   │   └── economy_data.sii
```

It has a few things you can change.
